creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
libsoup-2.40.3_4 fails to configure. The message produced by configure script says glib-networking is not present in the system, despite it being a dependency in the port's Makefile.

How-To-Repeat: 	Start build of devel/libsoup. The following message will appear, and build will fail.

	configure: error: libsoup requires glib-networking for TLS support.
